## What's changed

- Fix intermittent incorrect usage values caused by stale `codex app-server` snapshots.
- Confirm an early reset across three independent app-server reads before displaying it, while still supporting scheduled and manually granted resets.
- Restart the local app-server during refreshes so long-running cached values do not remain stuck.
- Add privacy-safe diagnostic logs with configurable retention for troubleshooting rate-limit responses.
- Make the top title-bar layout the default and place its recommended option first.

Diagnostic logs are stored under `%LOCALAPPDATA%\CodexRateMonitor\logs` and never contain tokens, account identifiers, or complete app-server messages.
